title: ribes californicum subsp. hesperium
intro: Ribes californicum subsp. hesperium, also known as California currant or golden currant, is a perennial shrub native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and various infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
